commit.subject: LU-18756 tests: fix DoM ops for sanity-sec 75a interop
commit.message:
LU-18756 tests: fix DoM ops for sanity-sec 75a interop

Sanity-sec 75a runs fallocate on a DoM file. In case the MDS uses an
older version where fallocate on DoM files isn't supported, the test
should skip the fallocate test. This patch implements this.

Fixes: 719f6763fe ("LU-18756 sec: add resource id check to oss and mds")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec env=ONLY="75a"
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-sec env=ONLY="75a" serverversion=EXA6
Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I950924298d10126686783f1f91a2a0aa36af767c
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60229
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
